title: Associate Member
comment:
- Taking part in the organization of events attended by 300+ people with various speakers from our industry.
- Supporting team coordination in our community by helping with task distribution, collaboration, and motivation.

Events:
- Mobile Developer Conference 25: Taken part in various sections of the event, from contacting speakers to preparing the space and schedule, attended by 200+ members and 30+ speakers.
- Web Developer Summit 25: Helped in the organization and sponsorship contacts. This was an event attended by 70 people and hosted 5 different sessions about web development.
- Web Developer Conference 25: Taken impactful role as one of the organisers of the event where we hosted 250+ attendees and 20 speakers in Kadir Has University from all topics like AWS, Backend and Security.

- Actively developing web projects that help both our team and our community.
- Attending events as a Strider to expand my network and secure more sponsors and speakers to support the community.
